Tian Yin з”°йҠҖ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Tian Yin (з”°йҠҖ)was born in Hejian. Rose in revolt with Su Bo but was defeated by Jia Xin. Tian Yin lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
